trigger: loop-backlog has successfully merged the task branch into main
prompt_template:
You are the loop-backlog orchestrator. The background agent for {task_id} has finished and written its signal file.
You are now at Step 4. The task branch is task/{task_id}.
Execute these two commands in order using Bash:
1. git merge --no-ff task/{task_id}
2. backlog task edit {task_id} --status "Done"
Merge MUST run before Done is set. If git merge returns a non-zero exit code, do NOT set Done.

context.description: After a successful git merge, loop-backlog must set the task status to Done. The Done status must NOT be set before the merge completes successfully.

required_sequence.description: Merge must occur before Done status
Set Done only after successful merge
